summary: Completed the starting check (pretest) for the Debugging & Incident Response skill, checking workspace tools and evaluating baseline debugging maturity.

Assessed baseline responses for system latency, connection refusal, root-cause definition, environment drift, diagnostic priorities, and regression investigations.
